phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pedro Romero exhibit is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la exposición Pedro Romero?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, pod-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DON-deh eh-STAH lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN PEH-droh roh-MEH-roh?

likely_response.local: Suba las escaleras, junto a la capilla.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AH LAH kah-PEEL-lah
likely_response.translation_en: On the upper floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the upper floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AH LAH kah-PEEL-lah
responses.french: Suba las escaleras, junto a la capilla.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ring entrance for visitors is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿por dónde se entra al ruedo los visitantes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, por DOHN-deh seh en-TRAH al RWEH-doh lohs vee-see-TEHN-tehs

likely_response.local: Por la puerta grande, al final del pasillo.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah GRAHN-deh AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
likely_response.translation_en: Through the main gate, at the end of the hall.

responses.english: Through the main gate, at the end of the hall.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah GRAHN-deh AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
responses.french: Por la puerta grande, al final del pasillo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bullfighting museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada del museo taurino?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEHL moo-SEH-oh tah-oo-REE-noh

likely_response.local: Junto a la Puerta Grande, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah GRAHN-deh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah GRAHN-deh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la Puerta Grande, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the chapel is inside the ring
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la capilla dentro del ruedo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh ehn-koo-EHN-trah lah kah-PEE-yah DEHN-troh dehl RWEH-doh?

likely_response.local: Está junto a los tendidos de sol.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHSTÁ HOON-toh AH LOHS tehn-DEE-dohs DEH SOHL
likely_response.translation_en: It is next to the sun stands.

responses.english: It is next to the sun stands.
responses.phonetic: EHSTÁ HOON-toh AH LOHS tehn-DEE-dohs DEH SOHL
responses.french: Está junto a los tendidos de sol.
